[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10101011 5
1 11011110 6
2 11111001 6
3 01111000 4
4 01100111 5
5 10001101 4
6 11010011 5
7 01111000 4

01 10 00010011 3
12 21 01110101 5

56 65 10011111 6

70 07 10010010 3

24 42 00011110 4
35 53 00110101 4
46 64 10010011 4

60 06 11101011 6
71 17 10000001 2

36 63 10101010 4

50 05 01110100 4
61 16 11111000 5
72 27 11110100 5

04 40 01111000 4 match 3 7
15 51 01100111 5 match 4
26 62 10001101 4 match 5
37 73 11010011 5 match 6
